note: From ser. Who you are / where you're from: "soy de Noruega", "soy turista".
From estar. How or where you are right now: "estoy bien", "estoy aqui".
From ser. "es un cafe", "es mi familia".
From ser. "de donde eres?" = where are you from?
From estar. "como estas?" = how are you?
From estar. "donde esta el baño?", "esta cerca".
